message:
🐛 Fix sync workflow: handle errors per-repo without aborting (#82)

* 🐛 Fix sync workflow: handle errors per-repo without aborting

- Remove `set -e` so one repo failure doesn't kill the entire sync
- Wrap push/PR creation in subshell with error handling
- Skip empty repos (no commits) that can't accept PRs
- Show clone errors in logs (was suppressed by 2>/dev/null)
- Track failure count in step summary
- Only fail the job if ALL repos fail

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add llm-d-prism back to sync list

Repo was recreated from template (issue #2 resolved).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,7 +33,8 @@ permissions:
 
 env:
   # All non-archived repos across llm-d and llm-d-incubation orgs.
-  # Excludes: llm-d-infra (source of truth), .github, templates, github.io, llm-d-incubation/llm-d-infra.
+  # Excludes: llm-d-infra (source of truth), .github, templates, github.io,
+  # llm-d-incubation/llm-d-infra.
   CONSUMING_REPOS: |
     llm-d/llm-d
     llm-d/llm-d-benchmark
@@ -66,10 +67,11 @@ jobs:
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SYNC_TOKEN }}
         run: |
-          set -euo pipefail
+          set -uo pipefail
 
           COMMIT_SHA="${GITHUB_SHA:0:7}"
           DRY_RUN="${{ inputs.dry-run || 'false' }}"
+          FAIL_COUNT=0
 
           # Step summary header
           echo "## gh-aw Workflow Sync Report" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
@@ -85,23 +87,33 @@ jobs:
 
             # Clone consuming repo (shallow)
             tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
-            if ! gh repo clone "$repo" "$tmpdir" -- --depth 1 2>/dev/null; then
+            if ! gh repo clone "$repo" "$tmpdir" -- --depth 1 2>&1; then
               echo "| $repo | **Clone failed** | Check SYNC_TOKEN permissions |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+              FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT + 1))
+              rm -rf "$tmpdir"
+              echo "::endgroup::"
+              continue
+            fi
+
+            # Skip empty repos (no commits yet — can't create PRs)
+            cd "$tmpdir"
+            if ! git log -1 --format="%H" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+              echo "| $repo | **Skipped** | Empty repo (no commits) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+              cd - > /dev/null
               rm -rf "$tmpdir"
               echo "::endgroup::"
               continue
             fi
 
             # Copy all gh-aw workflow files (.md + .lock.yml) and actions lock
-            mkdir -p "$tmpdir/.github/workflows" "$tmpdir/.github/aw"
+            mkdir -p ".github/workflows" ".github/aw"
             for wf in $GH_AW_WORKFLOWS; do
-              cp ".github/workflows/${wf}.md" "$tmpdir/.github/workflows/${wf}.md"
-              cp ".github/workflows/${wf}.lock.yml" "$tmpdir/.github/workflows/${wf}.lock.yml"
+              cp "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.github/workflows/${wf}.md" ".github/workflows/${wf}.md"
+              cp "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.github/workflows/${wf}.lock.yml" ".github/workflows/${wf}.lock.yml"
             done
-            cp ".github/aw/actions-lock.json" "$tmpdir/.github/aw/actions-lock.json"
+            cp "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.github/aw/actions-lock.json" ".github/aw/actions-lock.json"
 
             # Configure git auth for push (gh clone doesn't persist credentials)
-            cd "$tmpdir"
             git config --local url."https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"
 
             # Check for changes
@@ -126,35 +138,35 @@ jobs:
               continue
             fi
 
-            # Create or update sync branch
-            git checkout -b "$SYNC_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git checkout "$SYNC_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git checkout -b "$SYNC_BRANCH"
-            git \
-              -c user.name="llm-d-infra-sync" \
-              -c user.email="llm-d-infra-sync@users.noreply.github.com" \
-              commit -s -m "$(cat <<EOF
+            # Create or update sync branch, push, and open PR
+            # Wrapped in a subshell so a single repo failure doesn't stop the loop
+            if (
+              set -e
+              git checkout -b "$SYNC_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git checkout "$SYNC_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git checkout -b "$SYNC_BRANCH"
+              git \
+                -c user.name="llm-d-infra-sync" \
+                -c user.email="llm-d-infra-sync@users.noreply.github.com" \
+                commit -s -m "$(cat <<EOF
           Sync gh-aw workflows from llm-d-infra (${COMMIT_SHA})
 
           Updated workflows:
           $(for wf in $GH_AW_WORKFLOWS; do echo "  - ${wf}.md + ${wf}.lock.yml"; done)
 
           Source: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/commit/${{ github.sha }}
           EOF
-          )"
-            # Force push — we own this branch, and want the PR to show latest state
-            git push --force origin "$SYNC_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git push origin "$SYNC_BRANCH"
-
-            # Check if PR already exists for this branch
-            existing_pr=$(gh pr list --repo "$repo" --head "$SYNC_BRANCH" --state open --json url --jq '.[0].url' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
-
-            if [ -n "$existing_pr" ]; then
-              echo "| $repo | **PR updated** | [${existing_pr}](${existing_pr}) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
-            else
-              # Create new PR
-              pr_url=$(gh pr create \
-                --repo "$repo" \
-                --head "$SYNC_BRANCH" \
-                --title "Sync gh-aw workflows from llm-d-infra" \
-                --body "$(cat <<'PRBODY'
+              )"
+              git push --force origin "$SYNC_BRANCH"
+
+              existing_pr=$(gh pr list --repo "$repo" --head "$SYNC_BRANCH" --state open --json url --jq '.[0].url' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
+
+              if [ -n "$existing_pr" ]; then
+                echo "| $repo | **PR updated** | [${existing_pr}](${existing_pr}) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+              else
+                pr_url=$(gh pr create \
+                  --repo "$repo" \
+                  --head "$SYNC_BRANCH" \
+                  --title "Sync gh-aw workflows from llm-d-infra" \
+                  --body "$(cat <<'PRBODY'
           ## Automated gh-aw Workflow Sync
 
           This PR syncs the pre-compiled gh-aw workflows from [`llm-d/llm-d-infra`](https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-infra).
@@ -170,15 +182,29 @@ jobs:
 
           > Created by the [sync workflow](https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-infra/actions) in llm-d-infra.
           PRBODY
-              )" 2>&1)
+                )" 2>&1)
 
-              echo "| $repo | **PR created** | [${pr_url}](${pr_url}) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+                echo "| $repo | **PR created** | [${pr_url}](${pr_url}) |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+              fi
+            ); then
+              : # success
+            else
+              echo "::error::Failed to sync $repo"
+              echo "| $repo | **Sync failed** | Check logs |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+              FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT + 1))
             fi
 
-            cd - > /dev/null
+            cd - > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
             rm -rf "$tmpdir"
             echo "::endgroup::"
           done <<< "$CONSUMING_REPOS"
 
           echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
-          echo "_Dry run: ${DRY_RUN}_" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+          echo "_Dry run: ${DRY_RUN} | Failures: ${FAIL_COUNT}_" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+          # Fail the job only if ALL repos failed
+          total=$(echo "$CONSUMING_REPOS" | grep -c '[a-z]' || true)
+          if [ "$FAIL_COUNT" -eq "$total" ]; then
+            echo "::error::All repos failed to sync"
+            exit 1
+          fi
